instruction: Add a blue progress bar to the currency bangladeshi icon along the bottom (rect x=16, y=110, 96x6, fill #3b82f6).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-bangladeshi.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m8.25 7.5.415-.207a.75.75 0 0 1 1.085.67V10.5m0 0h6m-6 0h-1.5m1.5 0v5.438c0 .354.161.697.473.865a3.751 3.751 0 0 0 5.452-2.553c.083-.409-.263-.75-.68-.75h-.745M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-bangladeshi.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m8.25 7.5.415-.207a.75.75 0 0 1 1.085.67V10.5m0 0h6m-6 0h-1.5m1.5 0v5.438c0 .354.161.697.473.865a3.751 3.751 0 0 0 5.452-2.553c.083-.409-.263-.75-.68-.75h-.745M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="110" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
